task_completion.description: Navigate to the JFrog Artifactory URL
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the JFrog Artifactory login page or dashboard, with 'localhost:8082' visible in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Log in using the administrator credentials
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory interface shows the user is logged in as 'admin', typically visible in the top right corner of the dashboard.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the User Management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration/Security -> Users page is open, showing the list of current users or the user management interface.

task_completion.description: Fill in the new user details in the creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New User' form is open with 'john_doe' entered in the Username field and 'john.doe@company.com' in the Email field. Password fields should also appear filled (with dots/asterisks).

task_completion.description: Ensure the new user does not have admin privileges
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user creation form, the 'Admin' privileges checkbox is visibly unchecked before saving.

task_completion.description: Verify the new user appears in the users list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Users list in the Security module displays 'john_doe' as an existing user, confirming successful creation.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI rather than API/curl commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web browser and Artifactory UI, without terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts to create the user.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine JFrog Artifactory interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual elements match the standard JFrog Artifactory web application, not a text editor, mock-up, or local HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the user list
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open, and the users list appears naturally rendered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Artifactory URL is http://localhost:8082. The admin credentials are 'admin' / 'password'. The new user must have the username 'john_doe', email 'john.doe@company.com', and password 'JohnDoe@123'. The new user must NOT have admin privileges (the Admin checkbox must remain unchecked).
